sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23028" key="gunaikoqoi/nas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῠναικο-θοίνας</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n23028.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feasted by the women</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feaster of women,</tr_> epith. of Ares at Tegea, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:48:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.48.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
